title: mangifera dewildei
intro: Mangifera dewildei, also known as the Philippine mango tree, is a species of tree in the mango genus. It is native to the Philippines and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties. The bark and roots of the Mangifera dewildei plant have been found to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can be used to treat various health conditions such as fever, cough, and respiratory problems. The herbal preparations of Mangifera dewildei include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to alleviate symptoms of illness and promote overall health and wellness.
